name.en: GTE Laboratories / University of Massachusetts lineage
name.zh: GTE 实验室 / 麻省大学学术谱系

description.en: Temporal-difference learning gave reinforcement learning a compact way to learn predictions from experience. Instead of waiting for a final outcome, TD methods update value estimates using the next reward and the next prediction. This bootstrapping idea sits behind many later algorithms, including TD-Gammon, Q-learning, and actor-critic methods.
description.zh: 时序差分学习为强化学习提供了一种从经验中学习预测的紧凑方法。TD 方法不必等到最终结果，而是用下一步奖励和下一步预测来更新价值估计。这种自举思想支撑了 TD-Gammon、Q-learning 和 actor-critic 等后续算法。
